고화질 컷 이미지는 댓글에서 확인해 주세요!

指望下一个大C是狂气C
羊媽狂氣爆發繁育狂熱效果吃好吃滿，要玩羊媽狂氣C了嗎<:Thais_snicker:1468258174908891355>
36羊嗎
没吃到力量触伤回血护盾输光(
这次加强羊妈大招基伤果然
但是羊妈还是吃力量比较多
感觉12+医生有机会变单C<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
now normal char is more than 100 base ali grrr ?

现在应该已经可以打主线了   
不过我小号好久之前出掉了没办法试（
so does her furnace regen cap at 5% of max hp? the wording is kind of odd
the furnace now rechanrge equal to 10% of lost hp, whit a furnace cap of 50% max hp
for what I understand

沙耶的覺醒卡獲得50%基礎狂氣
阿拉克涅跟莫絲輸爛了
是說對固定治療有加成 我們索蕾爾一費有救了嗎
但是胚胎200才一顆而且蜘蛛救不了 我們索蕾爾狂氣爆發沒救了嗎

好好笑大家找狂氣C寧願討論羊媽也不帶索蕾爾玩😭
很多道中怪都是空殼，尤其是早期的融蝕怪

Any early thoughts on the kit? Sounds like a castor who kills the team instead of sustaining it, with buffs to try to make for it. Is that about it? Any thoughts on where she'd fit other than maybe discard or Doresain/Uvhash?

Corpo and aurita?
I mean shes good in divine realm
Yeah that's the discard team. She feels like she only fits very niche teams from what I understand. Make be ok elsewhere but not best in slot, kinda like Pickman or gdoll outside of poison
什麼東西
新機制直接安在聯動角身上
各位这个咋玩 能放超血队不
~~怎麼看起來有點像羊媽二代~~
能複製牌還能給侵蝕應該可以進大部分隊伍吧🤔

Do divine babies still give aliemus or not? The inforgraphic specifically mentions it doesn't give crit rate and the rest anymore, but the aliemus remain unacknowledged. On the other hand, from the Divine Ultra realm description from Arachne, they also did not mention the insight from annihilation is gone.
I assume they do
老大问一下能和杜玩吗？我现在队伍杜奥虫+菲茵。
蟲是誰😧
然後我主超維了，不太清楚
你可以翻翻前面的評論
克莱门汀
好哦
我感覺沙耶估計得搭接下來的血肉角
就卡拉布
https://tenor.com/view/neat-gif-meme-neat-gif-gif-19560608
I like it
勉强，杜对牌需求不大

目前仅个人脑测来看，沙耶适合
不依赖吞胎
依赖出牌启动
主要伤害在大招
大招终伤加成稀缺
的C位
12+医生挺适合的，大招一点终伤都没有，作为银钥手出牌收益也高
guys im too stupid to understand her kit can someone tell me if shes good or not
yes she seems very powerful for many teams (prediction)
as in mouchette levels?
等等我現在才注意到沙耶的三維堪比婭婭
and is she a support or dps
超好笑
of course yeah
corrosion needs dps
they're not really directly comparable characters since saya isn't a main damage

沒那麼低吧
那是60級的三圍
婭婭是90級3個99
I see
is it worth it to get her e12?
or do we not know that yet
婭又輸
我一直以為她三維99是60級
原來不是嗎
E12 worth only for up the corosion and a little aliemus but not really imo
但是沙耶的三維有點低了
I don't even see the interest in getting the OE
不過他大招給258護盾素什麼意思
any thoughts on her wod then?
本來以為阿拉一個例外
現在是隨隨便便就給大盾
驚天250%防禦力倍率

Arithmetica good, but the rest is made for her only I guess
unless you want a oost for corosion and baby making but it's sigil yield, and I don't really see much awaker this wheel would be put on beside Saya, but I'm no progamer
maybe some see a pathern that I don't
I see, thank you for your insight<:HomuPray_MM:588882044168437771>
guess we wait the gameplay for now on
It's 100% broken
Every supports wants it. Remove the sigil yield from it, remove the rest of the text apart from the +1 arit, and every support still wants it
200基础狂气，所以盾也翻倍（）
牢溫要哭了怎麼一個兩個盾都比她高
90等牢溫一個大是172
不帶護盾加成的命輪
回过神来发现这个2费给的羽种怎么那么吝啬，一张2费换大招随机一张卡变0费？
2費也有點難打出去了
其他收益只有胚胎
40% increase in everything on new embryo seems cool for any dps tho + 20% just for being on the team
屬性也沒自帶銀鑰
花2費吃不到多少銀還不一定搓得出一張胚胎
可能會有點卡手了
就这么对待给你引流破圈的联动角色，键猫真有你的👍
而且0费弃掉当前所有手牌
<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996> 我嘞个刚需过牌角
如果我要靠侵蚀打伤害，那就要赌手上没key牌？
Yeah but it slows down the embryo regen by a lot, dunno if it's worth it
More burst but less aliemus

I wonder how this is supposed to interact with Thais' rouse, since that upgrades basic Embryos with every Posse

Now that Saya gives different types of embryos, I wonder if that makes Thais' rouse less useful
Or perhaps these can still morph into the ones Thais gives
I'd assume Thais makes embryos with 60 stacks for Saya
Divine Caro
Crazy WOD too, love more arit
sigil yield lol
Pretty peak. We were long overdue.
reading her kit, i wonder will HP% healing from leigh's exalt be buffed by frenzy?
Yeah, but not worth it for E12 I suppose, both WOD and Saya
又是个辅助？花里胡哨的，如果这次复刻没淡墨我要跑路了，两个月了尽是辅助有钱都玩不到想玩的真等不起
YouSavedMorimens
from what i read saya could've been caro, aequor or ultra considering she eats people, has tentacles and is literally a being from another dimension
thankfully is caro
https://klipy.com/gifs/makima-makima-bean--k01KR7D43RB2ZK79RC0414DGNHT
Y-you, how could you display 18+ rating unfiltered  Nekkid saya image
深海有神国，超维有奇点，血肉是不是也出了
From someone who read the full VN there really was no other choice than caro
like you could stretch it to the others but caro lines up way too well
为了联动而入坑的人 也得吃上一块肉啊 拜托了

I'm glad I read the vn after hearing about the collab. I have trouble focusing enough to read but I got invested and it was fun to think about what'll happen next and pondering on the themes and characters
I know this is like the basics of reading but like I said me no read good <:horla_nervous:1333985940401553458>
being unafraid to go through such controversial things, while also not going overly gooner, helped made it such a unique experience
just face the truth dood most of the playerbase will accept any slop as long as it has "Morimens" brand slapped onto it

I don't see people leave over Saya collab, I see them complaining, but lack of Kath buffs? 

Now thats a real issue

R.I.P Blecnes
cant wait for Paya
LMAOOO <:Aurita_pinch:1468258028271833119>  S can be also written like that Paya
go back to pchool

is cursive equal in every school?

I don't remember the Q in particular to be like that on mine but I can attest to everything else

Apparently not. 

In my school, our Ss were fancier.

Edit: Noticed the Q in the image so  I removed that part of my comment. (I thought the O was the Q lol. My bad!)
dude teacher learn to his pupils how to write medieval enluminures like no one else ever before, not just stoopid cursive maj letters, this is for PEASANTS !
Weird ,why is P after R ?i always thought it was S after R<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>

Q is 2

i bet this is the next 999 game major plot twist...

#whenthedoorwitha9wasactuallyaq

<@332573289438380032> 您好，我看到了您报名参加比赛，请加我为好友，以及很抱歉的通知您，如果您不能共享屏幕的话，您将报名失败，现在已经没有足够的名额提供给不能共享屏幕的选手
Hello, I saw that you signed up for the competition. Please add me as a chat friend. And I'm sorry to inform you that if you can't share your screen, your registration will fail. There are no more available slots for participants who can't share their screens now.
Alright but it might lag
This means you can share your screen, but are worried about performance issues, such as lag?
Yeah over the past few weeks my box has been disconnecting and reconnecting
Maybe i can try using 4G
Maybe it cna be fine

<:Salvador_OK:1468258324066734305> <:Alva_goodjob:1468259169965707398> 
We've marked that you can share your screen and confirm your participation. Thank you for your support! Please contact us if you have any further questions.

感谢大家热情的参与，我们收到了很多特别棒的作品！

经过了多轮评选后，诞生了最终的获奖名单：

✦ 奖励会在5月30日结束前发到大家的邮箱~
一等奖的头像框如果以前获取过，在点击“领奖”后会自动转化成500银芯和50个追念羽笔
如果奖励方面有问题也请联系我。
✦ 注意：个别投稿者提供的链接失效/无法正常打开，咔哒无法查看作品，也没办法进行联系，因此我只能发放参与奖，敬请谅解。
也请大家投稿前确认一下链接能否正常点开，非常感谢~
✦ 投稿作品在线文档已更新.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mKHzSaL4D-874UTS5Dm8QqFtO-JtUn3Gdo9vRtGDnGE/edit?usp=sharing
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you all for your enthusiastic participation! We have received a lot of amazing works!After multiple rounds of selection, the final list of winners has been determined~

✦ The rewards will arrive in your inbox by midnight on May 30th.
If the first prize avatar box has been obtained before, it will automatically convert into 500 Silver and 50 Remembrance Quills after clicking "Award"
If there are any issues with the rewards, please also contact me.
✦ Note: Some of the links provided by a few contributors have become invalid or are inaccessible. Kada was unable to view these works, and there's no way to make contact either. Therefore, Goya can only distribute participation awards for these entries. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
✦ The online document for the submitted work has been updated.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mKHzSaL4D-874UTS5Dm8QqFtO-JtUn3Gdo9vRtGDnGE/edit?usp=sharing

content: 开心喵开心喵开心喵
謝謝薩爾瓦多幫我賺零用錢 還會繼續畫
yippie
Yippie I'm there :D
im wishing Saya is Caro, so for the next collab, it will be Ultra awakeners with the Psycho-pass series because they are both Gen Urobuchi's works 😂
Caro upscale<:agree:1400771815076528258>
my clown ass didnt even see this post

```css
“You're not scared of me? Aww... you're no fun...”

“I can do stuff like that, you know. Like rearranging or tweaking other creatures' bodies...”

✦ Saya VA: Midori Kawamura
```
logging in when the collab's out and all I see is MeatVision (TM) & the only uncorrupted thing is her banner
你咋不补货
我跑去淘宝蹲好久我徽章呢
Pump.
抽
Oh that does make more sense <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
So that is the best wheel in the game

Only thing that can powercreep this is....

+2 handsize +1 arith
Someone is gonna +12 it just for Ogier <:Ogier_Cheerup:1468259351889318049>
But imo hand size is more important than +1 arith
both are important
and you can run both wheels anyway
that's the good (and probably broken) part
Hand size wheels also have other useful effects
This is just arith on a stick for most teams
+1 mana is better than +2 hand size
Agreed on additional effects, also the stat is bad
But +1 mana is pretty much the best effect any card can ever have
A lot of stages are just miserable to play with 10 hand size
True, but stagnation is a mechanic and 5->6 mana is a huge power spike on many teams
It is strong i just dont think its more valuable than hand size
Also arc 2 staling mechanic is delayed a turn via this unless you have arith cap
Otherwise the main thing here is that this means all five dtide waves can have a once-only buff - one +1 arith, 4 handsize
It is an essential pickup tbh at E0, I think everyone can agree on that
Compare that to Doomsday for Mouchette lmao
Otherwise: devs have made a new universal Caro support without powercreeping Thais, which is cool.
She has card duping BUT it is not as instantly good as Thais.
It will get better for sure
Saya will just run her wheel and someone will run Thais wheel. Issue fixed
Btw this is an indirect buff to wanda
Since her cards cost a lot and Devs sadly didn't seem to lower the costs we will just supplement it with Arith cap wheels
Just got to +12 Saya's wheel, then run a hand wheel
They mentioned it wouldn't stack with wheels with the same effect so I'm assuming they'll make more wheels like that
Caraboo wheel +1 arith trust
Or maybe if they keep true to one per realm then the next chaos unit will have +1 arith wheel
A bit sad that they didn't make it buff bleeding too
Eeeh I mean. Bleed applies from your DMG
I don't think there is an awakener that just applies bleed

Poison too no ?
Devs are afraid of bleeding .. why ..
Cause it would double dip
And we would have a Caecus situation
Where his 2cost double dips and some older units too
Final DMG bonus is already good enough.
mobs and boss are getting stronger anyways so, things balance themselves in someway
It doesn't buff alert <:please:1356053110375714817>
bruh
Limited Leigh
She has a sister now
She will still be goated 🙏
Saya can be good. PCARO ON THE OTHER HAND
BOY THAT STINKS
The kit itself might be locked in, but if PCaro does turn out to be lackluster, perhaps the realm itself would see a tweak

Who knows?

I'll hook up on the copium, why not
yeah PLEASE rework Pcaro
Don't want the character that pulled me into the game to be linked with something that could be better

Castor was almost the one that brought me in, since a buddy of mine who plays loves him

But I'm lazy as fuck when it comes to starting new things. So I got to rep Saya
<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> those are way too fancy in some but close enough
